prompt: Scaffold TESTING.md for a Node.js repo with unit/integration/e2e structure, Jest+Playwright+testcontainers, two CI workflows, Stripe/Twilio as 3rd-party deps.

assertions.text: Contains all 7 template sections: Overview, Running locally, CI, Writing new tests, Coverage, Known Gaps, Appendix
Has a tier table distinguishing Unit / Integration / E2E with locations
Has a 3rd-party mocks table listing Stripe and Twilio
Documents CI workflows (test.yml + e2e.yml) with trigger and filter
Includes an orphan-check statement for CI coverage
Known Gaps section is present and explicitly empty (no placeholder text lies)
Appendix contains concrete filter expressions for each workflow
